title: Device Settings - Headset disconnected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings screen does not update to show disconnected-state options when headset is disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and paired.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter the Device Settings screen.
4. Observe the available settings options (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.) while the headset is connected.
5. Disconnect the headset (e.g., turn off the headset, move out of range, or disconnect via Bluetooth settings).
6. Return to the Device Settings screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the settings options now displayed on the Device Settings screen.
expected: The Device Settings screen should update to show only options available while the device is disconnected (e.g., limited settings or a prompt to reconnect). Connected-headset-specific options (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) should no longer be displayed.
